use_cases: FAQ sections on product or service websites to answer common questions
Content organization for about pages or portfolio sites with expandable sections
Feature documentation with collapsible explanations and details
Product showcases with expandable content cards
Navigation menus with nested content sections
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist FAQ accordion component featuring 8 expandable items with smooth click-to-reveal interactions. Uses a Plus icon that transforms on expansion, presenting content in a structured, single-select collapsible format. Ideal for organizing informational content, FAQs, or feature explanations on portfolios, SaaS products, and creative websites with a focus on clarity and user-friendly content discovery.
